// BenchmarkRunner.cs
public sealed class BenchmarkRunner : IDisposable
{
    private readonly SemaphoreSlim _dockerLock = new(1, 1);
    private readonly ConcurrentQueue<BenchmarkContext> _queue = new();
    private readonly ConcurrentDictionary<string, double> _results = new();
    private readonly CancellationTokenSource _cts = new();
    private readonly ILogger<BenchmarkRunner> _logger;

    public BenchmarkRunner(ILogger<BenchmarkRunner> logger) => _logger = logger;

    public void Enqueue(BenchmarkContext context) => _queue.Enqueue(context);

    public async Task RunAsync()
    {
        while (!_cts.Token.IsCancellationRequested)
        {
            if (_queue.TryDequeue(out var context))
            {
                await _dockerLock.WaitAsync(_cts.Token);
                try
                {
                    var score = await ExecuteInDockerAsync(context, _cts.Token);
                    _results[context.Model] = score;
                    _logger.LogInformation("Completed {Model}: {Score}", context.Model, score);
                }
                finally
                {
                    _dockerLock.Release();
                }
            }
            else if (_queue.IsEmpty)
            {
                break;
            }
            else
            {
                await Task.Delay(100, _cts.Token);
            }
        }
    }

    private async Task<double> ExecuteInDockerAsync(BenchmarkContext ctx, CancellationToken ct)
    {
        // Mock Docker execution logic
        await Task.Delay(1000, ct); 
        return ctx.Score(new[] { 0.9, 0.85, 0.92 });
    }

    public void Stop() => _cts.Cancel();
